name: Kaine 2018 HQ
subject: Not asking for money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Instead of asking you to help our campaign by chipping in, we've been asking you to take our Pledge to Reject Hate. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, as you know, we're doing something different this month.

Instead of asking you to help our campaign by chipping in, we've been asking you to take our [Pledge to Reject Hate.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ed/3e0906/6fc783d4/3e351060/1945407483/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Pledge+to+Reject+Hate&utm_campaign=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS")

This pledge is very important to us - most of all, it's important to Tim. **That 's why he reached out to you personally and asked you to take the pledge:** | [_As we come up on the one-year anniversary of that horrible day when three people lost their lives ... I think it's important that everybody in Virginia bands together to send a message:_ **" No Hate in Our State."****\- Tim Kaine**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ed/3e0906/6fc783d4/3e351066/1945407483/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+As+we+come+up+on+the+oneyear+anniversary&utm_campaign=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS")
---
Tim first came up with the idea for this pledge because of you, Derek.

After seeing the way you all continue to step up and support this campaign month after month, he knew how powerful it would be if each member of this grassroots team added their name to a pledge rejecting hate.

Our team set a goal of reaching [100,000 signatures](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ed/3e0906/6fc783d4/3e351064/1945407483/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+100000+signatures&utm_campaign=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS") before the anniversary of the deadly Charlottesville white supremacist rally, and - thanks to people like you stepping up all across the country - **we hope to be 100,000 strong by[August 12th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ed/3e0906/6fc783d4/3e35107a/1945407483/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+August+12th&utm_campaign=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS")**

**Make sure we reach that goal and reject hate in every state in America:[Sign the pledge today >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ed/3e0906/6fc783d4/3e351078/1945407483/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Sign+the+pledge+todaynbspgtgt&utm_campaign=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

_Team Kaine_

[**REJECT HATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ed/3e0906/6fc783d4/3e35107e/1945407483/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+REJECT+HATE&utm_campaign=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ed/3e0906/6fc783d4/3e35104b/1945407483/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS&source=20180909_1_PET_TEAM_Pledge-9-NS")

name: Team Martin Heinrich
subject: Johnson and his super PAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | We'll keep this quick. Gary Johnson was recently nominated to run against Martin, and he has two weeks to decide if he wants to formally enter the race. He already has a super PAC ready to support him the moment he decides.

**_[That's why we're racing to reach 50,000 donations to show him the power of our grassroots team. Contribute here to help Martin fight back against Gary Johnson and his super PAC ->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+wersquore+racing+to+reach&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2")_**

_Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:_

**Race Alert: New Mexico Libertarians nominate Gary Johnson for Senate race**

Gary Johnson is a former New Mexico governor and presidential candidate with backers who are already prepared with a super PAC to pour millions into his campaign. We need to fight back right now, .

**_[Will you help us reach 50,000 donations so he can see our strength?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+help+us+reach+50000+donations+s&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2")_**

* * *

Last weekend, Libertarians nominated Gary Johnson to challenge me in my re-election campaign, and this could change everything in my race.

Johnson, a former two-term governor of New Mexico and presidential candidate, has a national network of wealthy donors to bankroll his campaign. They already have a super PAC set up, ready to flood the airwaves with ads against me the moment Johnson gets in the race.

**In the Senate, Johnson would side with Republicans on everything from slashing Medicare and Medicaid to threatening Social Security and blocking increases to the minimum wage.**
**[STOP GARY JOHNSON](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+STOP+GARY+JOHNSON&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2")** Gary Johnson is wrong for New Mexico, and he'd stop Democrats from advancing our agenda nationwide. In such an important year for Senate Democrats, this is the last thing we need.

Johnson has less than two weeks to decide if he wants to formally enter the race, and that means the clock is ticking to show him New Mexicans do not want him in the Senate.

**_[Let's show him the power of our Democratic groundswell so he and his super PAC know what he's up against if he runs. Will you help us reach 50,000 donations so he can see our strength? Even just $1 will show New Mexicans are willing to defend me. Contribute now ->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Letrsquos+show+him+the+power+of+our+Demo&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2")** I'll make sure to keep you updated on this latest development in our race.

Thanks for your support,
Martin

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE

**Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends!**
Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6ef/43d8135f/605d71d0/5100c555/2796688644/VEsP/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2")**

Make sure to follow the campaign on **[Twitter](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6ef/43d8135f/605d71d0/5100c554/2796688644/VEsHBQ/ "https://twitter.com/teamheinrich?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2")** and **[Facebook.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6ef/43d8135f/605d71d0/5100c557/2796688644/VEsHBA/ "https://www.facebook.com/TeamHeinrich/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2")**

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6ef/43d8135f/605d71d0/5100c556/2796688644/VEsHBw/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6ef/43d8135f/605d71d0/5100c559/2796688644/VEsHBg/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180809_2_2").

Martin Heinrich for Senate
PO Box 25763
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Samantha Avila
subject: Walking & Calling for Dr. Ward THIS Saturday!
body:
|
---
N/A -- Good evening, This weekend, we are doing our third SUPER SATURDAY for Dr. Kelli Ward! With grassroot efforts like these and incredible people like yourself, together we can make sure that a TRUE conservative wins the primary election on August 28. We will be using CallHub, so if you have not signed up, we will gladly get you signed on! Join us this Saturday, August 11, at 10 a.m. at our Campaign Headquarters (2020 S McClintock Dr) - pizza and soda will be provided!
For those interested in walking for Dr. Ward, please join us at walking alongside Maria Symes this Saturday from 7:30 a.m. at [6032 East Lincoln Dr Paradise Valley](https://www.wardforarizona.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmaps.google.com%2F%3Fq%3D6032%2BEast%2BLincoln%2BDr%2BParadise%2BValley%26entry%3Dgmail%26source%3Dg&e=fa6f97f500b2dd17f5e159d2d0c5907d&utm_source=kelliward&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sat_walks_callhubreal&n=1) AZ 85253 (enter from the west gate).
Please reply to this email to let me know if you will walking with Team Ward this Saturday so we can get you set up on FieldEdge, this is the program we use for our walks.
For more information about Call Hub or walking this Saturday, feel free to contact Samantha Avila at [sam@kelliward.com](mailto:sam@kelliward.com) or (623) 205-8541. Thank you for your support!
Samantha Avila
[kelliward.com](http://www.wardforarizona.com/?e=fa6f97f500b2dd17f5e159d2d0c5907d&utm_source=kelliward&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sat_walks_callhubreal&n=2)
Kelli Ward for Senate, Inc. · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.wardforarizona.com/unsubscribe?e=fa6f97f500b2dd17f5e159d2d0c5907d&utm_source=kelliward&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sat_walks_callhubreal&n=3).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.wardforarizona.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fnationbuilder.com&e=fa6f97f500b2dd17f5e159d2d0c5907d&utm_source=kelliward&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sat_walks_callhubreal&n=4), software for leaders.

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Help is on the way for high drug prices
body:
| |
---
The White House • August 10, 2018
## **Help is on the way for high drug prices**
**We live in a golden era for American medicine,** senior health leaders from across the Trump Administration point out. Incredible new medicines and technologies improve and extend our lives. Yet all Americans at some point will face the burden of paying high prices for prescription drugs, say HHS Secretary Alex Azar, FDA Commissioner Scott Gottlieb, and CMS Administrator Seema Verma. **President Trump has a message** for these Americans: Help is on the way. “One of my greatest priorities is to reduce the price of prescription drugs,” the President said earlier this year. In May, he unveiled his blueprint for achieving just that. **The “American Patients First” blueprint** has a few important principles to guide the Administration’s plan of action:
* Encouraging innovation, such as by streamlining the approval process for over-the-counter drugs
* Promoting real price competition, including by advancing “biosimilars” and generics where appropriate
* Addressing foreign freeloading, including the practice of subsidizing countries that use socialized healthcare to offload costs on Americans

[Help is on the way for Americans facing high drug prices.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODEwLjkzNTM5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxMC45MzUzOTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY4MzY3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/help-way-americans-facing-high-drug-prices/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)[ ](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODEwLjkzNTM5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxMC45MzUzOTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY4MzY3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/help-way-americans-facing-high-drug-prices/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **The plan** : [See President Trump’s “American Patients First” blueprint](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODEwLjkzNTM5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxMC45MzUzOTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY4MzY3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-blueprint-lower-drug-prices/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## **An update on Judge Brett Kavanaugh**

**Senate leaders plan to hold a vote** on President Trump’s nominee for the Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh, by early fall. Meanwhile, a diverse group of legal scholars, editorial boards, and public figures have called for his swift confirmation. **“Judge Kavanaugh has an exemplary record** that suggests he will help to restore the Supreme Court to its proper, more modest role in American politics and society,” The Wall Street Journal’s editors write. His 300-some decisions on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia “reflect a great allegiance to the words of the Constitution,” the _Chicago Tribune_ adds. **Most important, he receives rave reviews** from those who know him best: his former students and fellow members of the legal community. “I’m [a liberal feminist lawyer,](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODEwLjkzNTM5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxMC45MzUzOTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY4MzY3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/lisa-blatt-im-liberal-feminist-lawyer-heres-democrats-support-judge-kavanaugh/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)” Lisa Blatt writes. “Sometimes a superstar is just a superstar.” [What to know about President Trump’s Supreme Court nominee](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODEwLjkzNTM5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxMC45MzUzOTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY4MzY3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/scotus/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)****

clean_body: | | The White House • August 10, 2018 Help is on the way for high drug prices We live in a golden era for American medicine, senior health leaders from across the Trump Administration point out. Incredible new medicines and technologies improve and extend our lives. Yet all Americans at some point will face the burden of paying high prices for prescription drugs, say HHS Secretary Alex Azar, FDA Commissioner Scott Gottlieb, and CMS Administrator Seema Verma. President Trump has a message for these Americans: Help is on the way. “One of my greatest priorities is to reduce the price of prescription drugs,” the President said earlier this year. In May, he unveiled his blueprint for achieving just that. The “American Patients First” blueprint has a few important principles to guide the Administration’s plan of action: Encouraging innovation, such as by streamlining the approval process for over-the-counter drugs Promoting real price competition, including by advancing “biosimilars” and generics where appropriate Addressing foreign freeloading, including the practice of subsidizing countries that use socialized healthcare to offload costs on Americans The plan : An update on Judge Brett Kavanaugh Senate leaders plan to hold a vote on President Trump’s nominee for the Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh, by early fall. Meanwhile, a diverse group of legal scholars, editorial boards, and public figures have called for his swift confirmation. “Judge Kavanaugh has an exemplary record that suggests he will help to restore the Supreme Court to its proper, more modest role in American politics and society,” The Wall Street Journal’s editors write. His 300-some decisions on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia “reflect a great allegiance to the words of the Constitution,” the Chicago Tribune adds. Most important, he receives rave reviews from those who know him best: his former students and fellow members of the legal community. “I’m ” Lisa Blatt writes. “Sometimes a superstar is just a superstar.” Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks First Lady Melania Trump visits with four-year-old Essence Overton during her visit to the Monroe Carell Jr. Children’s Hospital at Vanderbilt in Nashville, Tennessee** | July 24, 2018 | | The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

body:
#
Peter --
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign. **But first, I want to talk with you about tariffs.**
If you’ve talked to manufacturers, farmers, and folks who run small businesses in the past few weeks like I have on the campaign trail, I’m sure they’ll tell you the same thing they’re telling me about Washington’s new tariffs: **these tariffs are killing jobs.**
And while a bipartisan group in Congress has put forward legislation to put an end to these tariffs, members of the Washington establishment are standing in the way. Some of those same status-quo politicians claim to have written “strongly worded” letters about these tariffs, but they’re obstructing bipartisan efforts to rectify the situation.
**Tennesseans deserve better than that.**
We don’t need another politician in the Senate who will just keep sticking to the same partisan playbook that got us into this mess in the first place. It’s time to end politics as usual in Washington -- **it’s time to throw out that playbook.**
My team and I are working hard every day to bring people together so we can bring common sense back to Washington. We need your help to get our message in front of voters -- **so I’m asking:**
[**Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help support our campaign? name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: we have a friend in common
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catherine Cortez Masto for Senate
body:
[](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e55b4/688a0c21/53ac8327/73af6c23/2436630145/VEsH/ "http://www.catherinecortezmasto.com/")
[](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e55b4/688a0c21/53ac8327/73af6c23/2436630145/VEsE/ "http://www.catherinecortezmasto.com/")
Friends -
Welcome to the team! I'm Catherine, and I'm proud to represent Nevada in the U.S. Senate.
**As you know, our friend Jacky Rosen is running to join me in the U.S. Senate. Jacky is a proud progressive and a champion for Nevada 's working families.** But Jacky faces one of the toughest races this election year, and you can bet the GOP will stop at nothing to keep her from winning this dead-heat race. A Mitch McConnell-backed right-wing group has already pledged to spend millions to defeat Jacky.
**NBC News and Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight have both said that Democrats can't take back the Senate unless we win in Nevada. That's why I'm working every day to help ensure Jacky is fighting alongside me in the Senate next year.**
I'm doing everything I can to defend our hard-earned progress against Donald Trump and the GOP, standing up to Big Oil and the Big Banks and fighting for hardworking families. But with so much of what we care about at stake, I need you by my side - _especially_ if we're committed to electing Jacky Rosen to the Senate. But if we're going to elect Jacky, I need grassroots supporters like you on this team to help ensure we get it done.
Social media is one of the best ways to stay in the loop about what I'm fighting for in the Senate. **So if you haven 't already, be sure to follow us on **[Facebook](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e55b4/688a0c21/53ac8327/73af6c20/2436630145/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/catherinecortezmasto/")** , **[Twitter](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e55b4/688a0c21/53ac8327/73af6c21/2436630145/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/catherinefornv")** and **[Instagram](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e55b4/688a0c21/53ac8327/73af6c26/2436630145/VEsD/ "https://www.instagram.com/catherinecortezmastofornv/")** to get updates about every fight to defend our progress.**

Thanks for being a part of this team and helping send Jacky Rosen to the Senate.
_¡ La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine Cortez Masto
[Contribute](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e55b4/688a0c21/53ac8327/73af6c27/2436630145/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWFzdG8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azE5MjEtb3QtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/masto?refcode=jtk1921-ot-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: Derek, The races to replace Annie Kuster and Carol Shea-Porter are heating up with great candidates in both districts. Now, it's time to hear from them - all at one time, all at one location. We're going to have a great time on Thursday, August 16th at the Grappone Conference Center in Concord. With Jack Heath moderating, the debate will be a serious look at the issues that are important to Republican primary voters. Doors open at 5:15 PM. Sincerely, Todd CheewingNHGOP Executive Director Debate rules and qualifications can be found on the NHGOP Debate webpage. | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Another hit to the environment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
We all know it's true: climate change is real.
The planet is getting hotter. Gas prices are going up. The ice is melting. The fires are raging.
But now the Administration has announced plans to relax car emission standards and cause further damage to our environment. This could have devastating and lasting consequences.
**We can 't afford to sit by and let the Administration roll back these rules.**
Going backwards on fuel-efficient cars is a big, bad idea. It's not just gradual temperature rising -- experts say global warming is behind recent extreme weather disasters, like wildfires and droughts.
Yet we're the only country not in the international climate change agreement. We need to take these warnings seriously.
**Can you make a grassroots donation today to help us keep combating climate change?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=uYPTlKUuEx9JRfj6sQ%2BcWB19nfk6WJGK)**

****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=FjEyp6GGsutd04ReaI8%2FBB19nfk6WJGK)****
From Minnesotans living on Lake Superior, to farmers in Southern Minnesota dealing with severe weather, climate change impacts us all.
Let's stand up for science and not for this.
Thanks,
Amy

name: Paul Davis
subject: They’ve already struck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2mv5nKXE42ieA4MbL-RIyM5TUIlKd83JPzMq2mKdu0g=/hNU_fFf5Db1Qf0ucvoZVCOJwY5UxDjAj4Hqwo4P81Bk=?gpsid=13_36_2712&refcode=em18_180810_GEkik2_fnd_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180810_GEkik2_fnd_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Peter,

Now that Steve Watkins is officially our Republican opponent, Paul Ryan's super PAC has launched their D.C.-style smear campaign against me.

A few months ago, without even knowing who my opponent would be, they committed to spending $1.2 million on ads in our district to spread lies about our campaign -- and the first strike came Wednesday.

**[Peter, we have to act now and act fast. Chip in $5 now and help us fight back.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2mv5nKXE42ieA4MbL-RIyM5TUIlKd83JPzMq2mKdu0g=/hNU_fFf5Db1Qf0ucvoZVCOJwY5UxDjAj4Hqwo4P81Bk=?gpsid=13_36_2712&refcode=em18_180810_GEkik2_fnd_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180810_GEkik2_fnd_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

We're going up against millions of dollars from out-of-state dark money groups. Every dollar they spend is an attempt to silence the voices of Kansans. They don't care that I'm committed to working with both sides of the aisle to fight for our families -- they only care about buying a politician who will do their bidding in Congress.

**[It's urgent that we defend the people-powered campaign we've worked so hard to build together over the last year. Please chip in $5 or more now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2mv5nKXE42ieA4MbL-RIyM5TUIlKd83JPzMq2mKdu0g=/hNU_fFf5Db1Qf0ucvoZVCOJwY5UxDjAj4Hqwo4P81Bk=?gpsid=13_36_2712&refcode=em18_180810_GEkik2_fnd_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180810_GEkik2_fnd_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Thank you,

Paul

name: Khizr Khan
subject: I love Charlottesville
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
My son, Humayun Khan, attended the University of Virginia where he was a member of the Army ROTC program. He believed his time there helped to complete him as a person and so he wanted to give back. -
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

**I love Charlottesville.**

My son, Humayun Khan, attended the University of Virginia where he was a member of the Army ROTC program. He believed his time there helped to complete him as a person and so he wanted to give back. This led my son to serve overseas in the U.S. Army, where he showed the highest level of patriotism and bravery that one can show when he lost his life while protecting others.

After my son's death, my wife Ghazala and I moved to Charlottesville to be closer to our other two sons who were there. The community welcomed us with open arms and the university hosted two military ceremonies honoring our son, his service, and our loss.

Ghazala and I became very involved with the Army ROTC at UVA, as a way to honor our son and give back to a group that gave so much to him. It was by being a part of this community and working with these students that we were able to put our roots down in Charlottesville, Virginia.

[But two days from now will mark the one year anniversary of hate showing its face in the streets of Charlottesville, my home. I hope you will join me and add your name to Senator Kaine's pledge to reject hate.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ea/3e0906/6fd70e29/3e35124c/2835177228/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180810_1_PET_Khan_Surrogate-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+But+two+days+from+now+will+mark+the+one+&utm_campaign=20180810_1_PET_Khan_Surrogate-NS") | [**PLEDGE TO REJECT HATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ea/3e0906/6fd70e29/3e351243/2835177228/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180810_1_PET_Khan_Surrogate-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+PLEDGE+TO+REJECT+HATE&utm_campaign=20180810_1_PET_Khan_Surrogate-NS")
---
Derek, I promise to do my part to speak out against hate. I will always fight hard against the prejudiced views that disrespect my family, the memory of my son who loved this country, and countless families who call America home.

And I pledge to always fight for an inclusive Charlottesville - one that welcomes all in search of peace with open arms. I will continue to learn from and grow with the community of Charlottesville and to resist the hate we saw here, almost exactly one year ago.

[Senator Kaine and I pledge to reject hate, in all of its forms. Join us and sign the pledge today.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ea/3e0906/6fd70e29/3e351242/2835177228/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180810_1_PET_Khan_Surrogate-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Senator+Kaine+and+I+pledge+to+reject+hat&utm_campaign=20180810_1_PET_Khan_Surrogate-NS")

With respect,

_Khizr Khan_

[**PLEDGE TO REJECT HATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12ea/3e0906/6fd70e29/3e351241/2835177228/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180810_1_PET_Khan_Surrogate-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+PLEDGE+TO+REJECT+HATE&utm_campaign=20180810_1_PET_Khan_Surrogate-NS")

subject: Momentum: Ohio & Beto

Peter,

On Tuesday, a very interesting thing happened: in the Ohio 12th Congressional District, which Donald Trump won by 11 points, and which has been in Republican hands for decades, the Democrat placed within one point of the incumbent. This is a great sign! My race is even more winnable. Trump led Clinton by 9 points in the Texas 10th. And in November, the national Republican party will not be focused on helping my opponent, as they scramble to save seats nationwide. In other words: we can win! **[Will you chip in $20 today to power us forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1871575/9836811/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDZkYTQxOC1kMjljLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6CRU7z3UjDo-Vz0jDtsGeXaxpJiC6FExxUHs3htR-o=)** More signs of promise: last night, in Katy, Texas, a historically-conservative Houston suburb that has become increasingly diverse, over 1,000 people turned out for a Town Hall with Beto O'Rourke and a slate of Democratic candidates, including myself. Locals told me they had never seen so many Democrats in one place! I'm impressed by Beto's energy, by his love of Texas and Texans, by his commitment to running an open and accessible campaign. His work, and the work he inspires others to take on, makes all of us stronger. And more good news: at Beto's event, our campaign recruited 46 new volunteers! Please keep sending your energy to us here in the trenches. Every day we have more reason for optimism, but we have three months of hard work ahead. This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2bcc9f475da4440f8ec1383e6aecb756&_e=B98Vh36_98lBL5bHW1CiMe0Tosj96sIe_TUKCLFZ_z2fZNmqo1NaPKwD0OuZUwGK02vZA-p-Sai72BZ-PP8eoJrkfWUau1Pu0ZhAKQtB3Itl2GxzBhENRzF-1j6EYJbapXwhC9mfjxia1bxutDS6VccGA4vvjiBUrNBY-eOvL973cKiOtivjOyfuM4M2KDolRBE7QgfODNdZ_maVo5m3ZUsoH_LHNXE7U6OnVM0RdQWONN9F1EPaBNbKhc42c6Io). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2bcc9f475da4440f8ec1383e6aecb756&_e=GsZ2gc_A4hbwsNrM8aoefFZMCB5PiWyoclEP8s4EIzF5GSFRL6wGX80NcqvXf53JQEk0fQ8DvlYXZoEX1G9FaqoZuBlAyzqOB4bas4DqdtQStnZHZT-F8d-9biv_IFiy0d1YgwYy_MU80gmE1GGF1lM4OC2UfkZOdW0UeyDdm8ZVeFdC_saJl9O_-ZDqmQcM5QRZCmu3F5Dfgrb8cRsDqkcmQLZ7upQMLqIiHFuaVToC-j12Gqyd9pS0Gh-h1jQVaGEXzSoOwzTjcQ5dU7DphnTr8htgOShJoT0i-rg_qwRwBv1xITUD2m5d-OaMVyMiYF4KPpIiApKEoDTg7dm8FCMTPEM3qxsQXjjdX0jY5g5sbSYuwol4lyfeB2cfm_is) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2bcc9f475da4440f8ec1383e6aecb756&_e=GsZ2gc_A4hbwsNrM8aoefFZMCB5PiWyoclEP8s4EIzEtDUDmb9ZVPRIC17-IHv9ra6tBrdAY_GOuixUpzkoQeM8xfoHYSqg5X4rCHjmVs2hDZ-Z3MhHOO6QlW75HLWrkAT7YGHDmhOWNv7FD6SM2g3jV5JxBWBEWpG2_bVRBvgn4dtMPn5iS3tKEbAONE3KUsTKIGnrTAWpZ2MK1NXIexStkdtaRKaaGqCny-kgonGZceXa4FL9og0WEsIJpVzrkJzlm_VjBn38w6-IoM1bLxtwINhN8xUaE2iO_B6d4yhSKIjcNqc1jBlRDOz5pgsT_v2hw9FW8KbpWexp9ymf0ZCEWmXY1zR8WA73AMgvCtsE9elxG7EmdUdzteYHNvbVj) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2bcc9f475da4440f8ec1383e6aecb756&_e=GsZ2gc_A4hbwsNrM8aoefBMv6OuBtDkPkla4wokoLv0g_YnHlPUgo7XLJeWgl8BikVYxKXLBIEl25ti8141X7a80mKw7VzJwnmLzd99qukJYc9AxLYAkmrbJ0-o112OnumqqjxD9JKkjTSn6_QyqL1sRBeXTk2_ct9XgRgqqE7Iszf1YxrPeNJyUqQRbAXVptCjkex1G0CIrn43ADQW-fLfuQxPx0I3l4Xgr14iUYBN9enzMqACT0EZD7yU4Bjo5iY8N1z3-_TmyGQV9IKu1gQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2bcc9f475da4440f8ec1383e6aecb756&_e=GsZ2gc_A4hbwsNrM8aoefEiK4E_uR_SXuLjT3wED7x6XFV-PXVoXglQaNJIhxs_UWOcsxtXDTDknCBSh6acpp9b1tyAJBPQVTw2EyufKG0CzgDwLtQqEPXSbkrbBRlDbCZQtyFE-8t2HljfiCzePQ6KWxPm9WPFJSc3zBABkjTqt_PTNkmjP7bicOMtGHp-wAUJpO1Mm1POZCpME0VhM-HgpeoWtE_jDR-Px4DMSYdgEnJtATMNqcIW9sAtwb2MdUWB8ad_ZLdFu3MEHfeRbZQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2bcc9f475da4440f8ec1383e6aecb756&_e=GsZ2gc_A4hbwsNrM8aoefDDHjeM7oNaKqOWV_kWmjhV_anVyODaBAWBsla-x4ntp58BBa5mjCYYEj7PqeJOBAK916y-L01PYMbNQrUArjP--rZDyNeeRdrDNdI10yt9FGdhcHeZ0MZKgCHMZBcXtJ63uKFTfvNRHUqEo7JgW7EBwUEoZ0zBSBO-TNRhOJFhPAkuSEjVbzbvS_34-6iaX4RaOf4V1vfO_PfJxyo0f0qaAU0cYOIItxQDRpHcZKaze_aHXrv5S1ngCx-zzAJLZXA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2bcc9f475da4440f8ec1383e6aecb756&_e=GsZ2gc_A4hbwsNrM8aoefFZMCB5PiWyoclEP8s4EIzF5DRorfuCHPgC8KgzhObL0PAPnfD86Ls-lj9lUar4xGWfHhDAaw9qLYfp7qUpVi66Rftx-hI9tziR1z_g4JOo3zGJd-0s7qo3KUBS3B8XGVnT3ama0IZuq1EBkXq9qYLwRDFf6NYt6GMML5PGwA-QhRryfX8DLRiNKV7D2nYGg0Jbj3ZRWJNERWrdULS5ZsT3Lnu6drOz0ZCjz5c0MhWSCCG6hlKUpyPlSUSa5Nmr3Ii4gUTJ6-dnomvEz0P2x2o4amWdeJmU1l-Qn3z-oDELJCZlWsXSvaNMuz3hXicdnnOXJCbMlHYJbYq52DgHyJpK4i3VwreqheLI_CJZafnUAIyhg1CUVEUbaCKLNtIp7gg%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2bcc9f475da4440f8ec1383e6aecb756&_e=B98Vh36_98lBL5bHW1CiMe0Tosj96sIe_TUKCLFZ_z2fZNmqo1NaPKwD0OuZUwGK02vZA-p-Sai72BZ-PP8eoJrkfWUau1Pu0ZhAKQtB3Itl2GxzBhENRzF-1j6EYJbapXwhC9mfjxia1bxutDS6VccGA4vvjiBUrNBY-eOvL973cKiOtivjOyfuM4M2KDolRBE7QgfODNdZ_maVo5m3ZUsoH_LHNXE7U6OnVM0RdQWONN9F1EPaBNbKhc42c6Io) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2bcc9f475da4440f8ec1383e6aecb756&_e=B98Vh36_98lBL5bHW1CiMe0Tosj96sIe_TUKCLFZ_z2fZNmqo1NaPKwD0OuZUwGK02vZA-p-Sai72BZ-PP8eoJrkfWUau1Pu0ZhAKQtB3Itl2GxzBhENRzF-1j6EYJbapXwhC9mfjxia1bxutDS6VccGA4vvjiBUrNBY-eOvL973cKiOtivjOyfuM4M2KDolRBE7QgfODNdZ_maVo5m3ZUsoH_LHNXE7U6OnVM0RdQWONN9F1EPaBNbKhc42c6Io) to unsubscribe. clean_body: We’re just four days out from Tuesday’s primary and we’re still working hard to reach our $100K goal so we can make sure we're victorious. Before we head into the weekend, I have to ask you for a big favor, Friend. We’re just four days out from Tuesday’s primary and we’re still working hard to reach our $100K goal so we can make sure we're victorious. If we want to continue our get out the vote efforts over the weekend, we really need $10,000 by midnight. TONIGHT. Friend, that will help pay for transportation, food, and water for our hardworking volunteers who will be getting out the vote this weekend. Donating even $1 would help us buy a bottle of water for our team. $5 would mean we could grab a lunch for someone who has been knocking on doors or making calls all day. $100 could mean snacks for one local office. ANYTHING helps. We just need to make sure we reach this goal by midnight so our field teams can plan for the weekend. Please, chip in now. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Campaign Manager Stacy Schuster
subject: WSJ: “Menendez poster politician for corruption”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
Today, The Wall Street Journal blasted “the left’s anti-corruption campaign” for ignoring, “the poster politician for corruption,” Bob Menendez.

Friend -
Today, _The Wall Street Journal_ [**blasted**](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=52cbe370b2db43f6bdbba53f86da46f8&_e=7EI2n-iifeBapNKyzJKjI2HOYm-qHlH2xoI8GCC1Cdy7-6VQ0lGbTjN_yXaPFJXxDDm7kFi2HaNVpu8aDstu0PpF9gMtyzwyllF2wj3FKMFf7w_ZqhlFD4jZwa_AMSJO1MZuRDClHXwW4gpqFqWozLlCPAv0Q2K15u9ChlfMlgmYRFs66eCm8CUdduHItno3c8nx4Rwo2WhMyB1L_leRBPXVUzea8gzQSWd5i_07kYvSFugH7ZbCJYPxulD6wjZA5gznWDGBsSVVmipbyNBfM52CiYoWLHjBfUJeMP-LGl_X-nOLLTuRMEOvLDi9XZCMZSmYOcmZuvyTcylzDcm9oYadiKNPxkbbCwyuVLmZnIVFxdjlaTEspgTG0RxU79m5AbCkcmIEdr_0szDBn7r2RaJ5tkRV-6-jOwmuerEYyM5ZLbvd64wxNSLJPpl3dGuA) _**“the left’s anti-corruption campaign”**_ for ignoring, _**“the poster politician for corruption,”**_ Bob Menendez.

* "Democrats and their media friends have found what they think will be a killer political theme this fall: Corruption in Washington. Yet this sudden passion for political virtue could use some context, not least a mention of Bob Hugin’s campaign against disgraced Democratic Senator Bob Menendez in New Jersey." (Wall Street Journal Editorial Board, [**Corruption and Double Standards**](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=52cbe370b2db43f6bdbba53f86da46f8&_e=7EI2n-iifeBapNKyzJKjI2HOYm-qHlH2xoI8GCC1Cdy7-6VQ0lGbTjN_yXaPFJXxDDm7kFi2HaNVpu8aDstu0PpF9gMtyzwyllF2wj3FKMFf7w_ZqhlFD4jZwa_AMSJO1MZuRDClHXwW4gpqFqWozLlCPAv0Q2K15u9ChlfMlgmYRFs66eCm8CUdduHItno3c8nx4Rwo2WhMyB1L_leRBPXVUzea8gzQSWd5i_07kYumwreQ6oHSbZ5D7JJaDp3e5MqT09V1Z19LzQ99p9zmeom3A4EAy65mSYf-N75-YeCFQBFApLf-6-1BTtbluGf0ors9W2QW5Ui9K3MG-VN0yHloecIuv6eUglQFIzpQJ6__SGF_dUoZlpbMZ3-9GgQZ9MkTXsTymMFnnIYw4-zrvUn7M3oI0EqPbFZkPd2GqshDXq-xg1PMZgZbIFpy1hZi), 08/09/2018)

Menendez may have narrowly escaped jail last year after being indicted for bribery and corruption, but in April his colleagues on the bipartisan Senate Ethics Committee [**found him guilty of violating federal law and abusing his office**](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=52cbe370b2db43f6bdbba53f86da46f8&_e=7EI2n-iifeBapNKyzJKjIz3J1pYfW5gaJrnekx8N4hW0Z3zhI0o7JMmcVDOndSCfIFBZp4jHdJrjPopjLDFB1hztoHtIuujj6oH8x43_Uv9xgH8GdZ8gvNQG2Dsg3jezgzWvkihJyw3jsAz6tHo_AaYzMMjKS_c4ADG51uW24kxrj4t2i1padiZWSPRIrjHm_ukB_k-9hJI5rJLBMPTVmT58wY4Zrw2X-hS5ICZjubkk-5Nm52yAdOQVAPV9fOeDjs6IBodE6Ij8weuuK9cT-xU-S3xzg0q7Uj42eFAlE2Z3Cejar7brKb2OhpifWQ1c8S5xQFojBjuP-G926tQ8iDSKP_aGB5YViow1m6evP6rKH1b_V-f_-IEO3oBKqWZtZvTHKRs6l12bU8Vxio_kn_m4jyGozQPLnvac66WN1_QGbFI7eXZqVD177bCSEDlLzJMbp5TJeQaBe5iz4QNomg%3D%3D) for his “best friend” Dr. Sal Melgen, a rich campaign donor in Florida who stole _**[“ $73 million from Medicare by persuading elderly patients to undergo excruciating tests and treatments they didn't need for diseases they didn't have.”](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=52cbe370b2db43f6bdbba53f86da46f8&_e=7EI2n-iifeBapNKyzJKjI58b9iELz_KXy7kkCTw6-jjdWt5MhSf_sSbelI9RwU8u64R8t0OFiapIlBDP9NmkWnjjO6TsJcxJreGvnKkg-bvon684ZNGxD-JL92V-zvSosyK9eDy1aQa3yXD_L8CM3yjf_2AJJKVq3jhZ9g_k73RRWeOOiYG5jFupaYOfASQa8nUaYxmVyRKrD59EmpjzXPNb9eR9P1LPyDv_xEL1YWU-a2CInQOQ2ZYIHyBpobH1y9iNixuRO1GPPdwcRKB4dyzM9SQAediE7ehG8e_61BfV78bEczcqCW0hBLZPnQi6H99jGFdC2xlOV9Alyq25ESDL-GU3zsj5OFu7IWtwx6GZOhQsWwA8AGCOo_5-6kJHGG7byXaKPyexwT7RXjOrVTu275h7p-ZY94HPXG8lHTey6mUoUfiKIonuuuopl2PJ)**_ New Jersey deserves a Senator as good as its people, not one whose greatest accomplishment is staying one step ahead of the law. On November 6th, New Jerseyans will finally rid themselves of Menendez’s corrupt politics and ineffective representation by electing Marine veteran and job creator Bob Hugin.
Stacy SchusterCampaign Manager | [ ](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=52cbe370b2db43f6bdbba53f86da46f8&_e=7EI2n-iifeBapNKyzJKjI1IByKxiU4MbQ4RYvTZqZPkLxrUsuq7Ther6rGLXb9s2oNvi7wMGpnlCi3QjQHDEC3fxp7FZTBOTsXpihV8q_J5r1vC8Owz-dAaFBtKghyOOIjj6HPODFT99B-uxUmFUB053qFw5f7cf_O_NDSPWq8W2JwqxYXU78345GxaN0hTYF5D7ZPo7k16xu-_rMF-JDB3gjSw4jv2ml6vAFiHNfPP5CY5r4wj4Ne9xlbFkiSTqwm5vmUSbm5Z2dXWDwXuI2hWw91gTg4fXg_WT7HC1xxNb8PK1Zk0f7jYUY9czQQNVMeM5tWd3jnJrFXk16AeENjbeG6ROKrhxKcw-QsWDivs85SRp8MeiBUEP79RMPUE5 "Facebook")
---

---
[ ](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=52cbe370b2db43f6bdbba53f86da46f8&_e=7EI2n-iifeBapNKyzJKjI0zZvi1NYtFdSPtbueCb13yRQMEzIZ2wG843uGizg8lR_TFTL9MCBfXBQ0u6q8qOJtLLnbTZvlqmDDTASGJw8Rb2c73IjnocoKcqjlogY9FDq40rvemBuW7XlYwS4UG9KeTZ3p_rF6PViO7wwz-dkKe9fbXZkXnHEQbVhCqNyHlC6zWoekdwI-OmZZ_QRxWm52vaQ3KOc6xlRXenvEIxrshhVk3_d0bMIKzIEBkpbHZAIWnQzC9Sipm7CC2avsjnHS3Gb1O1hKZfQ8okqxp5Lrh3mvDrBjPwV1h5uGa49bDqo7NSb8bJbSPRR2lbNlSgi0JyBwG5cdyd3Ne553KY_2mvO21zjlZ6WGVc6aL6z05Q "Instagram")

name: Greg Pence
subject: [new endorsement] exciting news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence Victory |

_I’m honored and humbled._

**I received the endorsement from the Indiana Farm Bureau ELECT, which represents nearly 73,000 family farm members across the state.**

Our local economy is powered by agriculture.

As your Sixth District Congressman, I will support policy priorities for agriculture, farm families, and rural Indiana.

**[Share our endorsement on Facebook to spread the word about how I’ll be a strong advocate for Hoosier farmers >>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=a44f2d23325e4cd795bf2f4b5428fad1&_e=mwrRXT1zQIOckAbUpnSSOPZQBJRPEeuY931yfJ-wyfd4Kdjg0rtq7sj9aABOkr_lp-Z47VKjjKNKckcAA5EJ2oShJVdpghdR_jTbQZ6whsG2gwCjxthY1o84_4t5pDoyyowncGmTb2--IojiXvzY1JQtnCd-BPr4LDnHKtXLMG7vXiXL1yD6HECw1X-OxX6IV1Wk4PP0Ao8IwBDrHvnntETlKQ4c9pKZlGk5Uw843nlHmXbjSW9luHDP1b_yYB8G2hb8LmJ7AHx7iodc6vHogFcU3PUSc1fEoEZT9ij9B6wMYzjClYN9H7HyhBFGKQZKO3J3J4RGzOj9pQCukaSpaZpwTL8aRaU3F3yjx4d5UP6BYptL4WosPLLxn2HFpxEJphkmBv7WAI8UEVlbazn8CWetUXHT4_ngAlvZTQnKvf_BNdbPrOMN2Q_eWSZn3Tbe1rGFekDxQBAXNN26II99e7AzEhYtzT-1hmx6vCtwU91RorC3PgKPBM3Bo9_UmvQR)**

name: Team Morse
subject: JUST IN: We’re competing in the big leagues now

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ak5qSZlUyRQTuosezvGLoXVLx7JXoNBqoBmafJxp1fg=/Cu3W2W3c76YPYvWmYkeZXdjHhwEZWTKUiaK3fETbPiQ=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180810_TM_redtoblue1_all_logo)
Team, HUGE news. **We 've just qualified for the DCCC Red to Blue program**--a national program that identifies and supports top candidates with a strong chance of flipping their districts blue this November. This means that:
* The pundits are seeing what we already know: we have a **real shot** at electing Jessica and retiring Tom McClintock in November

* We've proven our competitiveness by **exceeding expectations** for fundraising and grassroots engagement (all you, team!)

* This race is getting national attention--Jessica is working hard every day, so **it 's up to us to prove that we can help take her across the finish line**

**We 're competing in the big leagues now--and with this new attention comes new and higher expectations. Can you rush a donation today to help us deliver? **

name: Jeff Denham
subject: not slowing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Denham for Congress
body:
I’m sure you’ve heard already...... Liberals are breaking fundraising records all over this country and they’re gaining momentum every minute.
Friend,

I’m sure you’ve heard already...

Liberals are breaking fundraising records all over this country and they’re gaining momentum every minute.

Our opponent is no exception. Josh Harder raised $1.25 million last quarter and friend, he’s not slowing down anytime soon.

He’s got the support of liberal elites like Nancy Pelosi and those donations are going to keep on coming through from San Francisco and out-of-state liberal donors. They think, if they raise enough, they can buy support throughout California and defeat every voice of reason in the whole state.

Friend, we can't let them succeed.

That’s why I’m asking all my supporters to donate $25 to my DEFEAT HARDER FUND today to help us make sure no one has the chance to drown out OUR message.
[DEFEAT HARDER: $25](http://links.jeffdenham.com/u/click?_t=ae4e127997b64fdfa10e37f90fe2a78d&_m=9d4bd4e94fb34c78b9aba49916f3a6ef&_e=GK-mPg0auLugcTwAXMOSZdkCpfzwOA9EXnDs7wQ52l-FmBYEPF6s0MRQ-CDo_OgHZJhJ_f0BR5gA8I0zlkA2d5jkC6dRIp3wusx2_GSws6v903s_QvhEF2_quRlJJpdOmaD1W6EJ2qZAu0npxiQsBCOdZ0R68mY6VOGO7VqJQHDtS2lTt-UmPPFfsRpugV31ry-sz0LG4b0ARoHyUQKO5GUypssjZZEoog9jCbTLPE8e_A6ucMzNVBFZ4Hm3qV_mfe-QH61Fiesi0zkhSHgc5DFBtvHe9okGHGGqp_IG9X1umUeL9R8cPjkUmYSXWrEcl-H6G4V9wGBH0lhJuqaVf9Mv6IxMYHxDXwIdb466HUk3VAl63OfgWo4xh2mq8cZppEXU-O4Fzv5JNdwmDaqhLyWma_x9e1EIICavUM_Dn9s%3D)

subject: Help us Celebrate Denise Todd's Birthday!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Today is Denise's Birthday!

Can you help me in wishing Denise Todd a happy birthday?

If you don't know, Denise Todd is Ian's loving wife, and a critical member of the campaign team, she has been constantly working hard to get Ian elected, and so today she and Ian are taking a day off to celebrate. Leave your birthday wishes in the comments on the Facebook post below to let Denise know that we all appreciate everything she does here in our district!

And if you are feeling really generous, you can give Denise a birthday present by helping Ian get elected in November by donating (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=denisebirthday&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=d11c30931d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_08_10_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-d11c30931d-9291445) to Ian's campaign!

name: Sally Miller, Organizing Director
subject: Make a plan to vote:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This is our chance to show everyone that the blue wave will be hitting Minnesota in November.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a200/c1f7015/6aa0527a/1141857d/2618795034/VEsH/ "https://www.dfl.org/vote/?utm_source=TinaSmith&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rtw_20180810_email") Great news, team! Minnesotans are heading to the polls now and voting early in big numbers. **[Have you found your polling place and made a plan to vote early or on Election Day yet? You can do that here.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a200/c1f7015/6aa0527a/1141857d/2618795034/VEsE/ "https://www.dfl.org/vote/?utm_source=TinaSmith&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rtw_20180810_email")** **[MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a200/c1f7015/6aa0527a/1141857d/2618795034/VEsF/ "https://www.dfl.org/vote/?utm_source=TinaSmith&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rtw_20180810_email")** On this site you can find the candidates running in your area, your early vote and Election Day polling places, and everything you need to make a plan and get to the polls. This is our chance to show everyone that the blue wave will be hitting Minnesota in November -- so make sure to keep up the momentum and vote now or on **August 14th!** Polls are open from 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM on Election Day. Thanks for being a voter, Sally Miller
Organizing Director | **Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help to hit her August goal if she is going to win this tough race. ** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a200/c1f7015/6aa0527a/1141857e/2618795034/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august?refcode=rtw_20180810_em-biobox&recurring=true")

body:
Here are three things you need to know right now about Missouri's TOSS-UP Senate race:
* **Claire is OFFICIALLY facing Trump's handpicked candidate, Josh Hawley**

* **The latest polls show this race is a DEAD HEAT**

* **We set a 2,400-member goal - and right now, we're still falling short of tomorrow's midnight deadline!**

The ONLY way Claire can protect this Democratic Senate seat is with you on this team. **[Will you donate $3 right now to join our Missouri Defenders general election team and protect this critical Senate seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr?refcode=jtk1214-fr-nd-v2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500)**
[ Confirm your Membership](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr?refcode=jtk1214-fr-nd-v2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500)

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: From Pooler to Macon [PHOTOS]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Over the next 88 days, my job is to reach out to voters and explain why I am the best person to serve as Georgia's next governor. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa944/34a064cc/a91c5e7/70e86ba/1117464977/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Dear Friends - Over the next 88 days, my job is to reach out to voters and explain why I am the best person to serve as Georgia's next governor. That's why I have been on the road, meeting face-to-face with Georgians from all walks of life and outlining my vision for our state. We launched our statewide "Jobs for Georgia" tour in Pooler last month. Since then, we've continued the tour in Macon and Dalton, talking with voters every step of the way. Here are a few stories from our stops in Middle Georgia: First, we visited Felicia's Cake Factory. Felicia's love of baking for friends and family grew into a thriving small business, but she told me how difficult it was to transition from her kitchen to a brick-and-mortar storefront in downtown Macon. Thanks to her family, her small team, and her seemingly boundless energy, Felicia has been able to explore new products and expand into catering and delivery services. **** As a "serial entrepreneur" myself, I know that having a good idea is only the first step. Transforming that idea into a product can be tough, and accessing capital to build a business can be even more difficult. Plus, small business owners with an exceptionally good idea often struggle to keep up with initial demand. Take Georgia Artisan, another Macon small business, for example. Andrew and his team use salvaged lumber from blighted homes to create beautiful, custom-made furniture they ship around the country. **** Andrew told me that Georgia Artisan more than quadrupled in size last year. But growth costs money. To meet demand, they had to find a larger workshop, hire more employees, and improve training. Many small businesses can't do all of that alone. But, in partnership with a governor who understands that investing in small business is investing in _all_ of Georgia, entrepreneurs can follow their dreams and create good jobs right where they are. **** Felicia and Andrew are proof: With ingenuity and the right support, a hobby can become a bustling business. That's as true in Macon as it is in Albany or Atlanta. **And with the right leadership and vision, we can create opportunity in communities that have been overlooked and ignored for too long.** Traveling across our great state - in major metro centers and tiny towns off the beaten track - I see the promise and potential of Georgia. That's why I'm running for governor. I believe in Georgia. I believe in our people. And I know that our beginnings do not have to dictate who we will become or what we can accomplish. **To read more stories from the road, follow our campaign on**[Facebook](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa944/34a064cc/a91c5e7/70e86bb/1117464977/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/")** , **[Twitter](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa944/34a064cc/a91c5e7/70e86b8/1117464977/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams")** , and **[Instagram](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa944/34a064cc/a91c5e7/70e86b9/1117464977/VEsC/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/")**. Read our **["Jobs for Georgia"](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa944/34a064cc/a91c5e7/70e86c6/1117464977/VEsD/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/-/2018_August/Policy/Jobs%20for%20Georgia.pdf")** plan, and share it with a friend.** Together, we will give Georgians a reason to vote on November 6th, and we can get to work building a state where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to thrive. Talk soon, Stacey
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa944/34a064cc/a91c5e7/70e86c7/1117464977/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODEwMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE081018-full")**

|

body:
Help us build on the progress we've made. |
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=728a6ef57c&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=976ac033b3&e=19cebfe173)

---|---
| Friend,
---
| **Did you know we could be facing record-low turnout in the Republican Primary on Tuesday, August 14th?**

_“All signs point to a record low turnout. Most Vermonters don’t know the names of the Democratic candidates... But in the last non-presidential primary year, fewer than 10 percent of the eligible voters bothered to vote. The bet is that this year’s figure will be even less.” - St. Albans Messenger _

**Let’s make sure this doesn’t happen! Your vote is your voice -- and Governor Scott is asking for your support. Your vote is critical so we can build on the progress we’ve made.**

With the help of Legislative Republicans, we have:
* Passed two general fund budgets with no new taxes or fees;
* Reduced the operational costs of state government by $32.5 million;
* Cut income tax rates across the board, saving $30 million;
* Prevented $71 million in property tax rate increases;
* And prevented onerous taxes and fees, like the carbon tax, a new payroll tax, and an occupancy fee.

The Governor knows there is so much more work to do. **And that’s why it’s more important than ever to vote for Governor Scott this Tuesday, August 14th, in the Republican Primary.**

Here are three simple things you can do to support Governor Scott over the next few days:
1. **Vote!** Cast your ballot for Governor Phil Scott in the Republican Primary on August 14th, or stop by your Town Clerk’s Office to vote early.
2. **Encourage at least 5 friends or family members to vote, too!**
3. Display a yard sign! If you don’t have a one, [please click here ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=dae30b19eb&e=19cebfe173)to make a request.
4. Support his re-election with a [financial contribution](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4cb5f00eac&e=19cebfe173)!

Sincerely,

Team Scott

**P.S. Did we mention we think you should vote!?!?!? :) **
---

name: Austin Petersen
subject: Thank you for everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, Thank you for everything you have done to support our campaign. When I first considered running for U.S. Senate, I called a lot of my friends and previous supporters from my 2016 campaign and asked what they thought. I received so much encouragement and support I knew that we could make an impact. Jeff and I got together and began making fundraising calls in my apartment. Before we knew it, we had built a campaign machine and started assembling our campaign team. We knew the odds were against us, but because of your generosity and support, we knew we wouldn’t be fighting alone. Friend, unfortunately we were unable to clinch the nomination. However, I do not regret a single thing. At the end of the day, over 54,000 Missouri GOP primary voters cast their ballot for a true liberty candidate. We had the opportunity to spread our message and grow the liberty movement. And I am still blown away by the sheer number of people that donated to our campaign. I love our donors. There’s just no way any of this would have been possible without your help. I wish we had won. However, I am not done spreading the message of liberty. I know a lot of people are bummed about our loss. But I am going to put this bluntly... The liberty movement is in retreat. We cannot afford to back down right now. I would encourage anyone of my supporters to consider running for office be it U.S. Senate, Congress, state house, or mayor. We need leaders that will make sacrifices to grow our movement and restore liberty. Don’t let this discourage you. We’ve gained ground for our ideas in this campaign. I for one am not giving up. Campaigns are temporary. The liberty movement is forever. Thank you again for everything. Your support means so much to me and I’m honored to call you a friend. In liberty, Austin

---
Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
([www.austinpetersen.com](http://www.austinpetersen.com/?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=091018_concession&n=1))

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

name: Rich Cordray
subject: Sherrod Brown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter, When I was in charge of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, it was my job to make sure the American people were treated fairly in the financial marketplace. It wasn't an easy lift. Wall Street has all the lobbyists and lawyers money can buy -- Ohio families and consumers don't. You won't be surprised to hear lots of Wall Street lobbyists and lawyers didn't like me, or my job, or the agency I led. But luckily, we had important allies in the fight. One of the most important was my friend Sherrod Brown -- he always had my back and stood up to make sure people weren't cheated or mistreated. That's why I'm writing you today. [_**Sherrod has always put Ohio families ahead of special interests, and that 's why we need to re-elect him as our senator. Can you chip in today and give Sherrod's campaign a grassroots boost?**_](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff898/4462dc26/6ea1899c/200759df/1909447637/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwODEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ clean_body: | | | Peter, When I was in charge of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, it was my job to make sure the American people were treated fairly in the financial marketplace. It wasn't an easy lift. Wall Street has all the lobbyists and lawyers money can buy -- Ohio families and consumers don't. You won't be surprised to hear lots of Wall Street lobbyists and lawyers didn't like me, or my job, or the agency I led. But luckily, we had important allies in the fight. One of the most important was my friend Sherrod Brown -- he always had my back and stood up to make sure people weren't cheated or mistreated. That's why I'm writing you today. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" When I led the CFPB, we got back $12 billion that Wall Street had taken from those that were cheated and mistreated and put it back where it belonged. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: You live in Defiance County - and we need your help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter, We are less than one hundred days from Election Day and there's never been a more important time to show your support for our campaign. You live in Defiance County and I need your help to build an army of grassroots supporters in your community. Together, we can out-raise, out-organize and out-work our opponent, but we can't do it without your help. _****_**[Click here to sign up to host a house party!](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff89e/4462dc26/6ea4ad8d/200759a5/638920153/VEsH/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/landing/f1704hp/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=brown&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+sign+up+to+host+a+house+pa&utm_campaign=putnamcounty&source=putnamcounty")**_****_ I need an army of grassroots supporters in Defiance County to win in November. House parties are one of the best ways to build that army. House party fundraisers do more than simply raise money -- they strengthen our grassroots network of support, amplify our organizing, and engage new supporters with the campaign. This helps continue the momentum by channeling anger and frustration into tangible action. _****_[Please sign up TODAY!](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff89e/4462dc26/6ea4ad8d/200759a4/638920153/VEsE/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/landing/f1704hp/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=brown&utm_content=2+-+Please+sign+up+TODAY&utm_campaign=putnamcounty&source=putnamcounty")_****_ **Sherrod** |

name: Leah (iPhone)
subject: big favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
If we want to continue our get out the vote efforts over the weekend, we really need $10,000 by midnight. TONIGHT.

Before we head into the weekend, I have to ask you for a big favor, Friend.

We’re just four days out from Tuesday’s primary and we’re still working hard to reach our $100K goal so we can make sure we're victorious.

If we want to continue our get out the vote efforts over the weekend, we really need $10,000 by midnight. TONIGHT.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b4e2438028244e979e6b0f28bfeee44d&_e=tcVFGxaDu9DgB9547-km-TDY4YtYPik9SLd4ccZWQGjUYWuaHwQ5mUP5o5PS5tyr3Wu8AlWgWGpQy-2tvQbVpYnuiowV2lGkBfBerkKWisFEDNzzJyvpQ9cL-AjfXArlJSmwGdKG1cwVThD3yepVKtR2Fv3DP7bkh6lIPW_wT8KOitdobBb-tBb9y-55sI_Yw7H1sVWMCMetxgjjtm8Q-YEywrzhdxILOreHzOcEYvYqU45OONCmwX8eFwd6xTTrM9f5hLzbUb63rIOgRkAKSlk2v_bV9WyKdtnIQqiN8UWp4aCWhXgN_AygW6yxCqYrY4rnW5jMqoeKZmzGM758Ma34EMTlIlbxm_-9BB0diAj-7Rp6mMhdwDdlpNP204zB_UBJ1Ne48OavWBek4w_0gzi8JR62YRlkRGYtipoqQJU%3D)

Friend, that will help pay for transportation, food, and water for our hardworking volunteers who will be getting out the vote this weekend. [**Can you help us out?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b4e2438028244e979e6b0f28bfeee44d&_e=tcVFGxaDu9DgB9547-km-TDY4YtYPik9SLd4ccZWQGjUYWuaHwQ5mUP5o5PS5tyr3Wu8AlWgWGpQy-2tvQbVpYnuiowV2lGkBfBerkKWisFEDNzzJyvpQ9cL-AjfXArlJSmwGdKG1cwVThD3yepVKtR2Fv3DP7bkh6lIPW_wT8KOitdobBb-tBb9y-55sI_Y6GwxpzNnrs1_NR4dhWwfB-fk30zVtGfS-AzlMzSYbzdNP1980sRnb0KF_6TbgJf55PD1Elw0claFHahhHUDk2IyMRqzoCnixdZmgQDefijXJoreyj8a9iAuOGCL06UCdLtbeYvY4T4tAfxxL7rVnSTLHjsNLKUAfTrnxq2b3M-qsRLzsGUCo03DxXBsHxFdw3lWdE5fj-zQmJOlEkR_cN-3ynMWuTG6VVfZPziwtDPA%3D)

Donating even $1 would help us buy a bottle of water for our team. $5 would mean we could grab a lunch for someone who has been knocking on doors or making calls all day. $100 could mean snacks for one local office.

ANYTHING helps.

We just need to make sure we reach this goal by midnight so our field teams can plan for the weekend.

Please, chip in now.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b4e2438028244e979e6b0f28bfeee44d&_e=-e59hHvLYVT8Zng1NZ4ZzUBDYlDIlGSTSNTozEpyHA8cXJrwlW_mT_pLcW4LMAZ4KEVB1zUWpCatNuF7B0_0PcwIaUOK7v6XS98LbnsP8YWT7nkE07Un4hRzvuQO3bmZmia5cfBZsnOxGMQqToP_tAIdNm73_1RVGz_vXwzP7LCPQpHLjyq_O8W-XOvo96ppmdFFLvvTZ8umXlmFvtG24_h1lXJLiIDh7sNNSlR0DAok38Te1ZvF2dG0rJ0S5GC3). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b4e2438028244e979e6b0f28bfeee44d&_e=tcVFGxaDu9DgB9547-km-Uz8khvK5-kd-arNJEwXSC_7jtAv7Y54YLdTe__j92IR_7b0O1LusEYSdYSY48YE1jZllXsp4bmjtbSL0QBW8Fw9NKfxHz-n9c9gWtv5NkgpczM4FczmGfIEJqHNZZ5MHYruomw7co8Pa4QPh0K1a5BLFnzP3K7MBIvhbNgqKIBb4uIABuinLVSap6sSwsN0eY378_SIVXDZjQpPsvUdfxRsLxjJqSwxJDQLDpcLMr-auEW1-qXiqwrzF0wn1EJwiiUyWSpFHB5Pi5oKTbkJAKcy5qgI3vQKgeoanV12l72E_aNxVx743-NolHq-5_n6kJr46FiTTnEh__qTt5M5msYDoAYBf7MOhvolbbLJc4sa) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b4e2438028244e979e6b0f28bfeee44d&_e=tcVFGxaDu9DgB9547-km-Uz8khvK5-kd-arNJEwXSC_yj6vk8v46YcmrIqqxC3u8nW5Kh6iexl1xap6tyaj08ivs-IHIZq5pxglztikysC7wBvYHu6cKRoRamYYvllX4Da5CjWFO91S6RQ1QXNHiRP018Ee8wTaBulw21MwQLtloGLupEUoTK8v73xZWlkom9XKGd7A97pD2rLNcvKJB7L-QTsfxJ3E-JIymCWkHqaSv_D0cUWnA-q8-5GWb1AsPLv8eu4ZRjmikLt4UKBYd9zj5c9w-4A2EzhKqHgQndvp4p_9_MyUaQ5-QO6dOT-7ft-A82OKeHpVlMBpmxWcCRBP5DUZV-BoREveZl0e8DNWxRropETZnAip0gWTyhJgz) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b4e2438028244e979e6b0f28bfeee44d&_e=tcVFGxaDu9DgB9547-km-ShXhdmDK_wjy3mySOlJdQ5DbjDEV2oXhfMHwFQ5CwowhSnFVkWMbOMyKhiOxWwjyVBpvI3cymS2cDahQj2-HaDEv_XbmL8uSEiCyXjKXAxN2A5MVJq1gzlROBGw2UUY9yaT8HhZCCy-urTtdnBcpRYUThLGJSA-ZunO5aPsjXD4ksABqI5Smm45UEQzo1D_nOgdNXiNAnqV8KVE1isa5vbmINAdagkfvKayyo8YRjkW8hEqOAPsBYQUXZOpg1rzNA%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b4e2438028244e979e6b0f28bfeee44d&_e=tcVFGxaDu9DgB9547-km-ZJrQZwuTybDiZQOR6PmIjSreA2tVr9a_O5wNGCp5vOEtacbFv2srhU-_n9iUI0-m8bZPupcsU03jNVv32pVxCRgNiLfmacuaUoQgGn8WYvZIaW5F8UcPkrSh46-DNmzhtzDRhL6dFLXwjidkAUo1v2tZ9LDrHTiblDr-iTHKBuW8ncvfXHWqTnb5mXTIHt9ZIi1jiCYbHlgs0aUL6kRpRb3o3LG6GF4x_2PkiliykKQwnnDIt0Qq3PYCpk7BikEuA%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b4e2438028244e979e6b0f28bfeee44d&_e=tcVFGxaDu9DgB9547-km-eGD_LNiZ4yZ2YlJ9GZAvEi5OK_G5AJR18bjBmkJKWWs9o9LrGgQHxjrcYO9fImUSlob1ASAYoE_-3oejo6uvlYeS-KuiqXZZN6G5oluv362KZu8_xMekOiIQ8_kA_9xati4OaPSKXGLlKWZrWyG6gdWwxZHm7V24IdWMmg_pSkOb1TxMKDnE2Q0l-l1HPTUvsLWUSV9u7cDY5HszFL1U1jkGpXM3Ad1xHgLnr-NEIf3xFg7sQEs79LERGCVHY_XaA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b4e2438028244e979e6b0f28bfeee44d&_e=tcVFGxaDu9DgB9547-km-Uz8khvK5-kd-arNJEwXSC9Ou0xtzKyqu9buRaELbgSy2ltl_QSWXf-QzSlwyei0jH6mnBSP344OxdgzTJrEGUThR95_rk0wG_Efvza_okuApavQn5mra9RqbHrTZw7UHNzvH5ClQ62r7SV8mPaCPtRew2Erutz9wUBjm7MHyJBWRIm9DzYAvyR_OH1F6E9DQNwAM_x4mZFj7JEzGRQgISkgM3dYwQhIK2lCTpkyC0NZfNWdyZb2Nc6tPGCXr8XyZWftoPV3fv614YHStfdqd65D4Y6518XapnQ24BPRqVwd7KsD2RT9o-a70ezzaK9taiBOuiAicUH-u3BTFzPIsWzfWGtHPmgEbAI2dJJ3UL312Sc09FX0wEwTTJtbkeqQow%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b4e2438028244e979e6b0f28bfeee44d&_e=-e59hHvLYVT8Zng1NZ4ZzUBDYlDIlGSTSNTozEpyHA8cXJrwlW_mT_pLcW4LMAZ4KEVB1zUWpCatNuF7B0_0PcwIaUOK7v6XS98LbnsP8YWT7nkE07Un4hRzvuQO3bmZmia5cfBZsnOxGMQqToP_tAIdNm73_1RVGz_vXwzP7LCPQpHLjyq_O8W-XOvo96ppmdFFLvvTZ8umXlmFvtG24_h1lXJLiIDh7sNNSlR0DAok38Te1ZvF2dG0rJ0S5GC3) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b4e2438028244e979e6b0f28bfeee44d&_e=-e59hHvLYVT8Zng1NZ4ZzUBDYlDIlGSTSNTozEpyHA8cXJrwlW_mT_pLcW4LMAZ4KEVB1zUWpCatNuF7B0_0PcwIaUOK7v6XS98LbnsP8YWT7nkE07Un4hRzvuQO3bmZmia5cfBZsnOxGMQqToP_tAIdNm73_1RVGz_vXwzP7LCPQpHLjyq_O8W-XOvo96ppmdFFLvvTZ8umXlmFvtG24_h1lXJLiIDh7sNNSlR0DAok38Te1ZvF2dG0rJ0S5GC3) to unsubscribe. clean_body: If we want to continue our get out the vote efforts over the weekend, we really need $10,000 by midnight. TONIGHT. Before we head into the weekend, I have to ask you for a big favor, Friend. We’re just four days out from Tuesday’s primary and we’re still working hard to reach our $100K goal so we can make sure we're victorious. If we want to continue our get out the vote efforts over the weekend, we really need $10,000 by midnight. TONIGHT. Friend, that will help pay for transportation, food, and water for our hardworking volunteers who will be getting out the vote this weekend. Donating even $1 would help us buy a bottle of water for our team. $5 would mean we could grab a lunch for someone who has been knocking on doors or making calls all day. $100 could mean snacks for one local office. ANYTHING helps. We just need to make sure we reach this goal by midnight so our field teams can plan for the weekend. Please, chip in now. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: 10 re-elects + 2 flips = a 🔵 Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4810/24c69fd9/25fe5827e/18844e5b/4169517334/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFET31N_digital_email_20180810_Senate1Liners_inact&source=WQEFET31N_digital_email_20180810_Senate1Liners_inact")
---

Peter,

Pro-choice Democratic women can take back the Senate in 2018.

To do it, we need to re-elect our 10 Senate women and help two candidates flip red seats.

But we can't take anything for granted.

Each and every one of our Senate women needs our help to overcome crowded primary elections, toss-up races, or swing state politics.

**[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women flip the Senate.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4810/24c69fd9/25fe5827e/18844e54/4169517334/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180810_email_Senate1Liners?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+prochoice+Democratic+wo&utm_campaign=WQEFET31N_digital_email_20180810_Senate1Liners_inact&source=WQEFET31N_digital_email_20180810_Senate1Liners_inact")**

All of our Senate candidates are facing tough races:
**Tammy Baldwin's** (WI) seat is a top target for the GOP this cycle. A long list of Republicans are vying to challenge her in a state President Trump won by a slim margin in 2016, the first time a Republican presidential candidate won the state in 32 years.

**Maria Cantwell** (WA) was one of the first women to defeat a sitting elected senator in a general election. She's up for another challenge this year as she faces off with her Republican opponent in a state known for close races.

We need **Dianne Feinstein's** (CA) experience and grit in the Senate, where she is the ranking member of the powerful Senate Judiciary Committee and holds Trump's judicial nominees accountable.

**Kirsten Gillibrand** (NY) won her election for her first full term in the Senate by record-breaking margins. She can do it again with our help.

There's a crowded primary of Republicans vying to challenge **Mazie Hirono** (HI) -- she's the only immigrant in the Senate and has tirelessly fought back against Trump's anti-immigrant agenda.

**Amy Klobuchar** (MN) is facing a crowded primary in a state Hillary Clinton won by only two points and where Republicans have been making gains at the state level.

Trump-endorsed Republican Josh Hawley is challenging **Claire McCaskill** (MO) in a toss-up race in a state Trump won by nearly 20 points. And the GOP is spending huge sums of money to help him defeat her.

In her run for the House in 2016, **Jacky Rosen** (NV) beat the odds and flipped an open red seat despite the millions the GOP spent against her. She can do it again this year as she runs in a toss-up race to replace Sen. Dean Heller -- the only Senate Republican facing re-election in a state Clinton won.

**Kyrsten Sinema** (AZ) is running in a toss-up race to fill the open red seat being vacated by Sen. Jeff Flake. The Republican primary has been called a "free-for-all," attracting extremists like Sheriff Joe Arpaio, who's known for gross human rights violations, and Kelli Ward, who received support from Trump and Steve Bannon.

**Tina Smith** (MN) is running to return to the Senate for the first time. Holding this seat is critical to taking back the Senate, and Republicans are doing everything they can to defeat Tina in a state Clinton won by only two points.

John James, who Trump called a "star," is challenging **Debbie Stabenow** (MI) in a state the president won by less than one point.

The first woman to represent her state in the Senate, **Elizabeth Warren** (MA) is fighting to keep her seat as Republicans, emboldened by unexpected gains in 2016, step up to challenge her.
All 12 of these women are key to flipping the Senate.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to the Senate:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Women-to-the-Senate](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4810/24c69fd9/25fe5827e/18844e55/4169517334/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180810_email_Senate1Liners?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectWomentotheS&utm_campaign=WQEFET31N_digital_email_20180810_Senate1Liners_inact&source=WQEFET31N_digital_email_20180810_Senate1Liners_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

**[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4810/24c69fd9/25fe5827e/18844e56/4169517334/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180810_email_Senate1Liners?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFET31N_digital_email_20180810_Senate1Liners_inact&source=WQEFET31N_digital_email_20180810_Senate1Liners_inact")**

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---
